item.title:
philhaigh_: Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 25min 'If you asked some players to spell their own name at that time, they couldn't do it.'
'
item.description:
Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 25min 'If you asked some players to spell their own name at that time, they couldn't do it.'
'It feels like you're there for about four days!'
Fascinated by those uneasy moments in the Crucible corridor before matches, so I asked players what it feels like.
De metro.co.uk 1 7 294

item.title:

item.title: phillbarrs: Phill Barrs @phillbarrs · 4h Night one of WrestleMania disappointing, some solid matches but too predictable everything
item.description:
Phill Barrs @phillbarrs · 4h Night one of WrestleMania disappointing, some solid matches but too predictable everything we saw coming. And the ending was a shocker.
Night two needs to be better #wrestlemania 2 294

item.title:
phillbarrs: Phill Barrs @phillbarrs · 4h They got this ending very wrong Cita WWE WrestleMania @WrestleMania · 4h #ANDSTILL
@CodyR
item.description:
Phill Barrs @phillbarrs · 4h They got this ending very wrong Cita WWE WrestleMania @WrestleMania · 4h #ANDSTILL
@CodyRhodes RETAINS the Undisputed WWE Title at #WrestleMania! 1 1 174
